matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-comment-001 title: adding and retrieving comments module: comment source pages: 1,3,4 preconditions: post exists in the system. test data: - comment content: "great post!" - user id: 1 - post id: 1 test steps: 1. create a new comment with the given content and user. 2. associate the comment with the post. 3. store the comment in the database. 4. retrieve the comment from the database. 5. verify the comment content and user association. expected result: 1. comment should be created successfully. 2. comment should be associated with the post. 3. comment should be stored in the database. 4. retrieved comment should match the original content and user association.

test case id: tc-postinteraction-001 title: browsing and commenting on posts module: postinteraction source pages: 4 preconditions: post and user exist in the system. test data: - post id: 1 - user id: 1 - comment content: "great post!" test steps: 1. browse the shared posts from the generaldashboard. 2. click on a specific post. 3. load the comments for the selected post. 4. navigate to the fullscreenpost view. 5. add a comment to the post. 6. submit the comment. 7. wait for the comment to be saved. expected result: 1. shared posts should be browsed successfully. 2. specific post should be clicked and comments loaded. 3. fullscreenpost view should display the post. 4. comment should be added successfully. 5. comment should be submitted. 6. comment should be saved successfully.

test case id: tc-post-001 title: creating and viewing posts module: post source pages: 1,3,4 preconditions: user exists in the system. test data: - post content: "hello, world!" - user id: 1 - neighborhood id: 1 test steps: 1. create a new post with the given content and user. 2. store the post in the database. 3. retrieve the post from the database. 4. verify the post content and user association. expected result: 1. post should be created successfully. 2. post should be stored in the database. 3. retrieved post should match the original content and user association.

test case id: tc-network-001 title: associating posts with neighborhoods module: network source pages: 1,3,4 preconditions: post and neighborhood exist in the system. test data: - post id: 1 - neighborhood id: 1 test steps: 1. associate the post with the neighborhood. 2. store the association in the database. 3. retrieve the association from the database. 4. verify the association between post and neighborhood. expected result: 1. association should be created successfully. 2. association should be stored in the database. 3. retrieved association should match the original post and neighborhood.

test case id: tc-chat-001 title: creating and managing chats module: chat source pages: 1,3,4 preconditions: users exist in the system. test data: - user id: 1 - chattedwith user id: 2 test steps: 1. create a new chatlist for the given users. 2. add the chattedwith user to the chatlist. 3. store the chatlist in the database. 4. retrieve the chatlist from the database. 5. verify the chatlist contains both users. expected result: 1. chatlist should be created successfully. 2. chattedwith user should be added to the chatlist. 3. chatlist should be stored in the database. 4. retrieved chatlist should contain both users.

test case id: tc-user-001 title: user creation and authentication module: user source pages: 1,2 preconditions: test data: - user details: id=1, nome="john", cognome="doe", email="john.doe@example.com", photo="http://example.com/photo.jpg" - valid credentials: username="john.doe", password="password123" - invalid credentials: username="invalid.user", password="wrongpassword" test steps: 1. call usercreateprocedure with valid user details. 2. call storeddatadb with "valid credentials" for authorization. 3. call usercreateprocedure with invalid user details. 4. call storeddatadb with "not exist" for authentication. expected result: 1. usercreateprocedure should create a new user entry in storeddatadb. 2. storeddatadb should return authorization success. 3. usercreateprocedure should handle invalid user details gracefully. 4. storeddatadb should return authentication success.

test case id: tc-invalidprofile-001 title: handling invalid profile module: profilevalidation source pages: 1,2,3,4,5 preconditions: profile does not exist. test data: - invalid profile id: 10 test steps: expected result:

test case id: tc-invalidcomment-001 title: handling invalid comment module: commentvalidation source pages: 1,2,3,4,5 preconditions: comment does not exist. test data: - invalid comment id: 1000 test steps: 1. perform operations with the invalid comment id. 2. verify the handling of invalid comment. expected result: 1. operations should handle invalid comment gracefully. 2. appropriate error messages should be displayed.

test case id: tc-profileview-001 title: viewing and interacting with profiles module: profileview source pages: 5 preconditions: user exists in the system. test data: - user id: 1 test steps: 1. view the resident profile from the itemresultsearch. 2. add the resident to contacts. 3. view the business profile from the itemresultsearch. 4. view unsold items from the business profile. 5. view promotions from the business profile. 6. make an appointment from the business profile. 7. perform a database write operation for the appointment. 8. confirm the successful operation. expected result: 1. resident profile should be viewed successfully. 2. resident should be added to contacts. 3. business profile should be viewed successfully. 4. unsold items should be viewed successfully. 5. promotions should be viewed successfully. 6. appointment should be made successfully. 7. database write operation should succeed. 8. successful operation confirmation should be received.

test case id: tc-profile-001 title: navigating to profile sections module: profile source pages: 3 preconditions: user exists in the system. test data: - user id: 1 test steps: 1. click on the profile photo from the home screen. 2. verify the transition to the profile section. 3. click on the notifications icon from the home screen. 4. verify the transition to the notification section. 5. click on the map icon from the home screen. 6. verify the transition to the mapfullscreenapi. 7. click on the home access icon from the home screen. 8. verify the transition back to the home screen. 9. click on the personal profile access icon from the home screen. 10. verify the transition to the profile section. 11. click on the chat access icon from the home screen. 12. verify the transition to the chat section. 13. click on the general archive access icon from the home screen. 14. verify the transition to the generaldashboard. expected result: 1. transition to the profile section should occur. 2. transition to the notification section should occur. 3. transition to the mapfullscreenapi should occur. 4. transition back to the home screen should occur. 5. transition to the profile section should occur. 6. transition to the chat section should occur. 7. transition to the generaldashboard should occur.

test case id: tc-authfailure-001 title: handling authentication failure module: authentication source pages: 2 preconditions: user does not exist in the system. test data: - user details: id=1, nome="john", cognome="doe", email="john.doe@example.com", photo="http://example.com/photo.jpg" - invalid credentials: username="john.doe", password="wrongpassword" test steps: 1. attempt to create a new user with invalid credentials. 2. verify the authentication failure. expected result: 1. user creation should fail due to invalid credentials. 2. authentication failure should be handled gracefully.

test case id: tc-user-001 title: user creation and authentication module: user source pages: 1,2 preconditions: test data: - user details: id=1, nome="john", cognome="doe", email="john.doe@example.com", photo="http://example.com/photo.jpg" - valid credentials: username="john.doe", password="password123" - invalid credentials: username="invalid.user", password="wrongpassword" test steps: 1. call usercreateprocedure with valid user details. 2. call storeddatadb with "valid credentials" for authorization. 3. call usercreateprocedure with invalid user details. 4. call storeddatadb with "not exist" for authentication. expected result: 1. usercreateprocedure should create a new user entry in storeddatadb. 2. storeddatadb should return authorization success. 3. usercreateprocedure should handle invalid user details gracefully. 4. storeddatadb should return authentication success.

test case id: tc-user-001 title: user creation and authentication module: user source pages: 1,2 preconditions: test data: - user details: id=1, nome="john", cognome="doe", email="john.doe@example.com", photo="http://example.com/photo.jpg" - valid credentials: username="john.doe", password="password123" - invalid credentials: username="invalid.user", password="wrongpassword" test steps: 1. call usercreateprocedure with valid user details. 2. call storeddatadb with "valid credentials" for authorization. 3. call usercreateprocedure with invalid user details. 4. call storeddatadb with "not exist" for authentication. expected result: 1. usercreateprocedure should create a new user entry in storeddatadb. 2. storeddatadb should return authorization success. 3. usercreateprocedure should handle invalid user details gracefully. 4. storeddatadb should return authentication success.

test case id: tc-chat-001 title: creating and managing chats module: chat source pages: 1,3,4 preconditions: users exist in the system. test data: - user id: 1 - chattedwith user id: 2 test steps: 1. create a new chatlist for the given users. 2. add the chattedwith user to the chatlist. 3. store the chatlist in the database. 4. retrieve the chatlist from the database. 5. verify the chatlist contains both users. expected result: 1. chatlist should be created successfully. 2. chattedwith user should be added to the chatlist. 3. chatlist should be stored in the database. 4. retrieved chatlist should contain both users.

test case id: tc-postinteraction-001 title: browsing and commenting on posts module: postinteraction source pages: 4 preconditions: post and user exist in the system. test data: - post id: 1 - user id: 1 - comment content: "great post!" test steps: 1. browse the shared posts from the generaldashboard. 2. click on a specific post. 3. load the comments for the selected post. 4. navigate to the fullscreenpost view. 5. add a comment to the post. 6. submit the comment. 7. wait for the comment to be saved. expected result: 1. shared posts should be browsed successfully. 2. specific post should be clicked and comments loaded. 3. fullscreenpost view should display the post. 4. comment should be added successfully. 5. comment should be submitted. 6. comment should be saved successfully.

test case id: tc-profileview-001 title: viewing and interacting with profiles module: profileview source pages: 5 preconditions: user exists in the system. test data: - user id: 1 test steps: 1. view the resident profile from the itemresultsearch. 2. add the resident to contacts. 3. view the business profile from the itemresultsearch. 4. view unsold items from the business profile. 5. view promotions from the business profile. 6. make an appointment from the business profile. 7. perform a database write operation for the appointment. 8. confirm the successful operation. expected result: 1. resident profile should be viewed successfully. 2. resident should be added to contacts. 3. business profile should be viewed successfully. 4. unsold items should be viewed successfully. 5. promotions should be viewed successfully. 6. appointment should be made successfully. 7. database write operation should succeed. 8. successful operation confirmation should be received.

test case id: tc-chat-001 title: creating and managing chats module: chat source pages: 1,3,4 preconditions: users exist in the system. test data: - user id: 1 - chattedwith user id: 2 test steps: 1. create a new chatlist for the given users. 2. add the chattedwith user to the chatlist. 3. store the chatlist in the database. 4. retrieve the chatlist from the database. 5. verify the chatlist contains both users. expected result: 1. chatlist should be created successfully. 2. chattedwith user should be added to the chatlist. 3. chatlist should be stored in the database. 4. retrieved chatlist should contain both users.

test case id: tc-postinteraction-001 title: browsing and commenting on posts module: postinteraction source pages: 4 preconditions: post and user exist in the system. test data: - post id: 1 - user id: 1 - comment content: "great post!" test steps: 1. browse the shared posts from the generaldashboard. 2. click on a specific post. 3. load the comments for the selected post. 4. navigate to the fullscreenpost view. 5. add a comment to the post. 6. submit the comment. 7. wait for the comment to be saved. expected result: 1. shared posts should be browsed successfully. 2. specific post should be clicked and comments loaded. 3. fullscreenpost view should display the post. 4. comment should be added successfully. 5. comment should be submitted. 6. comment should be saved successfully.

test case id: tc-authfailure-001 title: handling authentication failure module: authentication source pages: 2 preconditions: user does not exist in the system. test data: - user details: id=1, nome="john", cognome="doe", email="john.doe@example.com", photo="http://example.com/photo.jpg" - invalid credentials: username="john.doe", password="wrongpassword" test steps: 1. attempt to create a new user with invalid credentials. 2. verify the authentication failure. expected result: 1. user creation should fail due to invalid credentials. 2. authentication failure should be handled gracefully.

test case id: tc-comment-001 title: adding and retrieving comments module: comment source pages: 1,3,4 preconditions: post exists in the system. test data: - comment content: "great post!" - user id: 1 - post id: 1 test steps: 1. create a new comment with the given content and user. 2. associate the comment with the post. 3. store the comment in the database. 4. retrieve the comment from the database. 5. verify the comment content and user association. expected result: 1. comment should be created successfully. 2. comment should be associated with the post. 3. comment should be stored in the database. 4. retrieved comment should match the original content and user association.

test case id: tc-chat-001 title: creating and managing chats module: chat source pages: 1,3,4 preconditions: users exist in the system. test data: - user id: 1 - chattedwith user id: 2 test steps: 1. create a new chatlist for the given users. 2. add the chattedwith user to the chatlist. 3. store the chatlist in the database. 4. retrieve the chatlist from the database. 5. verify the chatlist contains both users. expected result: 1. chatlist should be created successfully. 2. chattedwith user should be added to the chatlist. 3. chatlist should be stored in the database. 4. retrieved chatlist should contain both users.

test case id: tc-postinteraction-001 title: browsing and commenting on posts module: postinteraction source pages: 4 preconditions: post and user exist in the system. test data: - post id: 1 - user id: 1 - comment content: "great post!" test steps: 1. browse the shared posts from the generaldashboard. 2. click on a specific post. 3. load the comments for the selected post. 4. navigate to the fullscreenpost view. 5. add a comment to the post. 6. submit the comment. 7. wait for the comment to be saved. expected result: 1. shared posts should be browsed successfully. 2. specific post should be clicked and comments loaded. 3. fullscreenpost view should display the post. 4. comment should be added successfully. 5. comment should be submitted. 6. comment should be saved successfully.

test case id: tc-user-001 title: user creation and authentication module: user source pages: 1,2 preconditions: test data: - user details: id=1, nome="john", cognome="doe", email="john.doe@example.com", photo="http://example.com/photo.jpg" - valid credentials: username="john.doe", password="password123" - invalid credentials: username="invalid.user", password="wrongpassword" test steps: 1. call usercreateprocedure with valid user details. 2. call storeddatadb with "valid credentials" for authorization. 3. call usercreateprocedure with invalid user details. 4. call storeddatadb with "not exist" for authentication. expected result: 1. usercreateprocedure should create a new user entry in storeddatadb. 2. storeddatadb should return authorization success. 3. usercreateprocedure should handle invalid user details gracefully. 4. storeddatadb should return authentication success.

test case id: tc-user-001 title: user creation and authentication module: user source pages: 1,2 preconditions: test data: - user details: id=1, nome="john", cognome="doe", email="john.doe@example.com", photo="http://example.com/photo.jpg" - valid credentials: username="john.doe", password="password123" - invalid credentials: username="invalid.user", password="wrongpassword" test steps: 1. call usercreateprocedure with valid user details. 2. call storeddatadb with "valid credentials" for authorization. 3. call usercreateprocedure with invalid user details. 4. call storeddatadb with "not exist" for authentication. expected result: 1. usercreateprocedure should create a new user entry in storeddatadb. 2. storeddatadb should return authorization success. 3. usercreateprocedure should handle invalid user details gracefully. 4. storeddatadb should return authentication success.

test case id: tc-postinteraction-001 title: browsing and commenting on posts module: postinteraction source pages: 4 preconditions: post and user exist in the system. test data: - post id: 1 - user id: 1 - comment content: "great post!" test steps: 1. browse the shared posts from the generaldashboard. 2. click on a specific post. 3. load the comments for the selected post. 4. navigate to the fullscreenpost view. 5. add a comment to the post. 6. submit the comment. 7. wait for the comment to be saved. expected result: 1. shared posts should be browsed successfully. 2. specific post should be clicked and comments loaded. 3. fullscreenpost view should display the post. 4. comment should be added successfully. 5. comment should be submitted. 6. comment should be saved successfully.

test case id: tc-profile-001 title: navigating to profile sections module: profile source pages: 3 preconditions: user exists in the system. test data: - user id: 1 test steps: 1. click on the profile photo from the home screen. 2. verify the transition to the profile section. 3. click on the notifications icon from the home screen. 4. verify the transition to the notification section. 5. click on the map icon from the home screen. 6. verify the transition to the mapfullscreenapi. 7. click on the home access icon from the home screen. 8. verify the transition back to the home screen. 9. click on the personal profile access icon from the home screen. 10. verify the transition to the profile section. 11. click on the chat access icon from the home screen. 12. verify the transition to the chat section. 13. click on the general archive access icon from the home screen. 14. verify the transition to the generaldashboard. expected result: 1. transition to the profile section should occur. 2. transition to the notification section should occur. 3. transition to the mapfullscreenapi should occur. 4. transition back to the home screen should occur. 5. transition to the profile section should occur. 6. transition to the chat section should occur. 7. transition to the generaldashboard should occur.

test case id: tc-chat-001 title: creating and managing chats module: chat source pages: 1,3,4 preconditions: users exist in the system. test data: - user id: 1 - chattedwith user id: 2 test steps: 1. create a new chatlist for the given users. 2. add the chattedwith user to the chatlist. 3. store the chatlist in the database. 4. retrieve the chatlist from the database. 5. verify the chatlist contains both users. expected result: 1. chatlist should be created successfully. 2. chattedwith user should be added to the chatlist. 3. chatlist should be stored in the database. 4. retrieved chatlist should contain both users.

test case id: tc-user-001 title: user creation and authentication module: user source pages: 1,2 preconditions: test data: - user details: id=1, nome="john", cognome="doe", email="john.doe@example.com", photo="http://example.com/photo.jpg" - valid credentials: username="john.doe", password="password123" - invalid credentials: username="invalid.user", password="wrongpassword" test steps: 1. call usercreateprocedure with valid user details. 2. call storeddatadb with "valid credentials" for authorization. 3. call usercreateprocedure with invalid user details. 4. call storeddatadb with "not exist" for authentication. expected result: 1. usercreateprocedure should create a new user entry in storeddatadb. 2. storeddatadb should return authorization success. 3. usercreateprocedure should handle invalid user details gracefully. 4. storeddatadb should return authentication success.

test case id: tc-network-001 title: associating posts with neighborhoods module: network source pages: 1,3,4 preconditions: post and neighborhood exist in the system. test data: - post id: 1 - neighborhood id: 1 test steps: 1. associate the post with the neighborhood. 2. store the association in the database. 3. retrieve the association from the database. 4. verify the association between post and neighborhood. expected result: 1. association should be created successfully. 2. association should be stored in the database. 3. retrieved association should match the original post and neighborhood.

test case id: tc-postinteraction-001 title: browsing and commenting on posts module: postinteraction source pages: 4 preconditions: post and user exist in the system. test data: - post id: 1 - user id: 1 - comment content: "great post!" test steps: 1. browse the shared posts from the generaldashboard. 2. click on a specific post. 3. load the comments for the selected post. 4. navigate to the fullscreenpost view. 5. add a comment to the post. 6. submit the comment. 7. wait for the comment to be saved. expected result: 1. shared posts should be browsed successfully. 2. specific post should be clicked and comments loaded. 3. fullscreenpost view should display the post. 4. comment should be added successfully. 5. comment should be submitted. 6. comment should be saved successfully.

test case id: tc-post-001 title: creating and viewing posts module: post source pages: 1,3,4 preconditions: user exists in the system. test data: - post content: "hello, world!" - user id: 1 - neighborhood id: 1 test steps: 1. create a new post with the given content and user. 2. store the post in the database. 3. retrieve the post from the database. 4. verify the post content and user association. expected result: 1. post should be created successfully. 2. post should be stored in the database. 3. retrieved post should match the original content and user association.

test case id: tc-comment-001 title: adding and retrieving comments module: comment source pages: 1,3,4 preconditions: post exists in the system. test data: - comment content: "great post!" - user id: 1 - post id: 1 test steps: 1. create a new comment with the given content and user. 2. associate the comment with the post. 3. store the comment in the database. 4. retrieve the comment from the database. 5. verify the comment content and user association. expected result: 1. comment should be created successfully. 2. comment should be associated with the post. 3. comment should be stored in the database. 4. retrieved comment should match the original content and user association.

test case id: tc-user-001 title: user creation and authentication module: user source pages: 1,2 preconditions: test data: - user details: id=1, nome="john", cognome="doe", email="john.doe@example.com", photo="http://example.com/photo.jpg" - valid credentials: username="john.doe", password="password123" - invalid credentials: username="invalid.user", password="wrongpassword" test steps: 1. call usercreateprocedure with valid user details. 2. call storeddatadb with "valid credentials" for authorization. 3. call usercreateprocedure with invalid user details. 4. call storeddatadb with "not exist" for authentication. expected result: 1. usercreateprocedure should create a new user entry in storeddatadb. 2. storeddatadb should return authorization success. 3. usercreateprocedure should handle invalid user details gracefully. 4. storeddatadb should return authentication success.

test case id: tc-chat-001 title: creating and managing chats module: chat source pages: 1,3,4 preconditions: users exist in the system. test data: - user id: 1 - chattedwith user id: 2 test steps: 1. create a new chatlist for the given users. 2. add the chattedwith user to the chatlist. 3. store the chatlist in the database. 4. retrieve the chatlist from the database. 5. verify the chatlist contains both users. expected result: 1. chatlist should be created successfully. 2. chattedwith user should be added to the chatlist. 3. chatlist should be stored in the database. 4. retrieved chatlist should contain both users.

test case id: tc-network-001 title: associating posts with neighborhoods module: network source pages: 1,3,4 preconditions: post and neighborhood exist in the system. test data: - post id: 1 - neighborhood id: 1 test steps: 1. associate the post with the neighborhood. 2. store the association in the database. 3. retrieve the association from the database. 4. verify the association between post and neighborhood. expected result: 1. association should be created successfully. 2. association should be stored in the database. 3. retrieved association should match the original post and neighborhood.

test case id: tc-postinteraction-001 title: browsing and commenting on posts module: postinteraction source pages: 4 preconditions: post and user exist in the system. test data: - post id: 1 - user id: 1 - comment content: "great post!" test steps: 1. browse the shared posts from the generaldashboard. 2. click on a specific post. 3. load the comments for the selected post. 4. navigate to the fullscreenpost view. 5. add a comment to the post. 6. submit the comment. 7. wait for the comment to be saved. expected result: 1. shared posts should be browsed successfully. 2. specific post should be clicked and comments loaded. 3. fullscreenpost view should display the post. 4. comment should be added successfully. 5. comment should be submitted. 6. comment should be saved successfully.

test case id: tc-profileview-001 title: viewing and interacting with profiles module: profileview source pages: 5 preconditions: user exists in the system. test data: - user id: 1 test steps: 1. view the resident profile from the itemresultsearch. 2. add the resident to contacts. 3. view the business profile from the itemresultsearch. 4. view unsold items from the business profile. 5. view promotions from the business profile. 6. make an appointment from the business profile. 7. perform a database write operation for the appointment. 8. confirm the successful operation. expected result: 1. resident profile should be viewed successfully. 2. resident should be added to contacts. 3. business profile should be viewed successfully. 4. unsold items should be viewed successfully. 5. promotions should be viewed successfully. 6. appointment should be made successfully. 7. database write operation should succeed. 8. successful operation confirmation should be received.

test case id: tc-profile-001 title: navigating to profile sections module: profile source pages: 3 preconditions: user exists in the system. test data: - user id: 1 test steps: 1. click on the profile photo from the home screen. 2. verify the transition to the profile section. 3. click on the notifications icon from the home screen. 4. verify the transition to the notification section. 5. click on the map icon from the home screen. 6. verify the transition to the mapfullscreenapi. 7. click on the home access icon from the home screen. 8. verify the transition back to the home screen. 9. click on the personal profile access icon from the home screen. 10. verify the transition to the profile section. 11. click on the chat access icon from the home screen. 12. verify the transition to the chat section. 13. click on the general archive access icon from the home screen. 14. verify the transition to the generaldashboard. expected result: 1. transition to the profile section should occur. 2. transition to the notification section should occur. 3. transition to the mapfullscreenapi should occur. 4. transition back to the home screen should occur. 5. transition to the profile section should occur. 6. transition to the chat section should occur. 7. transition to the generaldashboard should occur.
